sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40464" key="e)pipei/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπείθ-εια</orth>, poet. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπειθ-είη</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπειθ-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">confidence</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0530.tlg006:6:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Gaur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
